title: Bitcoin Deepens Losses - Crypto Market Under Pressure
description: Bitcoin has fallen sharply below USD 60,000 as long liquidations, reduced rate-cut expectations, Strategy’s bitcoin sale, weak institutional demand and broader crypto market concerns deepen selling pressure.
